---
name: Bug report template
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: felixgamer27

---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

**.macro file**
Please add an exported .macro/.mdr file of the macro to know your variables

**Smartphone (please complete the following information):**
 - Device: [e.g. Samsung Galaxy A16]
 - OS: [e.g. Andoid 15 One Ui 7.0]
 - MacroDroid version [e.g. MacroDroid 5.65.9]
 - BDND Version [e.g. 4.1.0a]

**Error code**
If this bug gives you an error (e.g. Better 414, Http 404) please include it here

**Posible fix**
If you know something that may help, add it here

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
